R0208.title: Medical IoT Specific Risk
R0208.definition: Attacks on medical IoT devices (pacemakers, insulin pumps, monitors, etc.) may directly threaten patient life safety.

references.title: Annual report on the riskiest connected devices: medical IoT

R0208.description: Attacks on medical IoT devices (pacemakers, insulin pumps, monitors, etc.) may directly threaten patient life safety.
R0208.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
